description_long: This is a pair of aviator-style sunglasses featuring large, teardrop-shaped lenses set in a thin, metallic frame. The lenses are dark and opaque, providing significant coverage and a classic, timeless look. The frame is full-rimmed, with slender temples that extend straight back and curve gently at the ends for a secure fit behind the ears. The bridge is a double-bar design, with a prominent top bar and adjustable nose pads for comfort. The temples appear to be unadorned, maintaining a minimalist and functional aesthetic. No visible brand markings or embellishments are present, emphasizing a clean and utilitarian style.
description: Aviator sunglasses with dark lenses, thin metallic frame, and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, dark teardrop lenses and double-bar bridge.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin, straight temples and the slim profile of the frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the curvature of the temples and the back of the lenses.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the slender temples and frame thickness.
attribute_frame_design: The frame is a classic aviator shape with large, teardrop lenses and a thin, full-rim structure. It features a double-bar bridge and slender, straight temples that curve at the ends. The overall style is minimalist and functional, with no visible embellishments.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses are dark green, fully tinted, and opaque, providing strong sun protection without any visible gradient or mirrored effect.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a double-bar design with a prominent top bar and adjustable nose pads, offering both structural support and comfort.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are thin, straight, and unadorned, with a gentle curve at the ends for ear support. No patterns, engravings, or decorative elements are visible.
